case_title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION vs. ACEVEDO, MOISES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT ACEVEDO, MOISES ACEVEDO, MARIA EACH OTHER OCCUPANT 1-10 ACEVEDO, ELSA ACEVEDO, ERIC SUMMONS ISSUED
FUNDS REFERRED TO IN ESCHEATMENT NOTICE HAVE BEEN ESCHEATED TO THE COURT'S OPERATION FUND - EFFECTIVE APRIL 23, 2013
